purpose: Transparent decorative Gold Mine art for the approved Gold Mine inspection card

projectAuthorization.scope: Warpkeep PR #49 preparation and the reviewed Gold Wagon integration's use of the background-cleaned derivative in the public Warpkeep GitHub repository, plus an eventual official warpkeep.com Pages runtime only after separately approved deployment. This is use authorization only, not deployment approval.
notGranted: general third-party derivative or redistribution permission
Gold Mine placement, renderer, server, browser-derived balance, reward, or entitlement authority

generation.prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: high-resolution in-game Gold Mine inspection artwork
Primary request: Create a polished high-resolution cutout based on the supplied Gold Mine reference. Preserve the same subject: a stylized fantasy gold mine built into a tall gray rock outcrop, bright faceted gold ore veins, a dark wooden mine entrance, a small wooden ore cart with gold crystals, rails, and a small timber chest. Improve material clarity and crisp silhouette while retaining the readable 3/4 front view and high-quality strategy-game visual language.
Input images: Image 1 is the edit target and visual reference; preserve its core composition and mine identity.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for later background removal.
Style/medium: premium stylized 3D game illustration, clean sculpted forms, rich but controlled colors, inspection-card quality.
Composition/framing: centered subject, generous transparent-safe padding on every side, full mine visible, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: warm sunlit rim highlights on gold and wood, soft material shading only within the subject.
Constraints: use #00ff00 only for the perfectly uniform background. Background must have no shadows, gradients, floor plane, texture, reflection, vignette, or lighting variation. No cast or contact shadow. Do not include any text, labels, UI, logos, watermark, people, or extra buildings. Keep crisp separated edges suitable for alpha extraction.

runtimeAsset.delivery: same-origin checked-in runtime asset; no external CDN

licence.policy: The exact project instruction authorizes this Warpkeep runtime use but does not establish a public relicensing grant. See ASSETS-LICENSE.md.
